## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      11 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Mar 3, 2026 - Jul 7, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Pfanni68_, Apr 12, 2026, 1/5: "I use Google Keep very often, usually on my phone (which is Android). I also use it on my iPad to use the notes I previously took on my phone. But since the mid of March, the app on the iPad doesn‘t start anymore. Have been waiting for a bug fix for weeks now, but still nothing changed. Please fix this!!!"
            2. _Matienkrai_, Apr 7, 2026, 1/5: "Still not functioning since a few weeks, despite all the recent updates, the app still freezes on the loading page…"
            3. _Zonixx_, Apr 3, 2026, 1/5: "Recent update completely broke the app. Stuck on the initial logo screen forever. I use keep for everything and this makes it unusable."
